title: eupatorium rostellatum
intro: Eupatorium rostellatum, also known as Rattlesnake Weed, is a perennial herb native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which aid in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Eupatorium rostellatum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in salves and ointments for topical applications.
